g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about EC2 web server setup')
sendPrompt('What is an Internet Gateway in AWS?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Amazon RDS setup')
sendPrompt('How do I configure security groups for RDS?')
sendPrompt('Explain how AWS Route 53 DNS works')
sendPrompt('What is AWS WAF and when should I use it?')
sendPrompt('How does a user request reach EC2?')
